phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale della villa, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-soh preen-chee-PAH-leh DEL-lah VEEL-lah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso comprare il biglietto qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh kom-PRAH-reh eel bee-LYET-toh KWee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the ticket office here.

responses.english: Yes, at the ticket office here.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, la villa è aperta oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, lah VEEL-lah EH ah-PEHR-tah OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è permesso fare fotografie nei giardini, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, EH per-MES-soh FAH-reh fo-toh-GRAH-fee-eh nay jar-DEE-nee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Only in the gardens, not inside.

responses.english: Only in the gardens, not inside.
